certified_current_position.worker_authority: bounded execution participation only after AiGOL authorization
certified_current_position.worker_relationship_to_aigol: AiGOL validates, authorizes, governs, records; Worker executes
certified_current_position.worker_relationship_to_llm: LLM proposes; Worker never receives raw LLM authority
certified_current_position.worker_relationship_to_replay: Worker evidence must be append-only and replay-visible

future_constraint: future Worker work must implement or consolidate existing execution-only semantics before creating new Worker concepts
